docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYMAN BROTHERS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GARAY, GUILLERMO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
